name: Horizontal Cylindrical / Rectangular High-Pressure Steam Sterilizers
description: High-capacity autoclaves for CSSD departments, engineered for continuous sterilization loads with controlled temperature and pressure performance. Available in horizontal cylindrical and rectangular configurations.

name: High-Speed 'Flash' Steam Sterilizers
description: Rapid-cycle sterilizers for OT instrument turnaround between procedures, designed to reduce inter-procedure delays while supporting sterilization assurance.

name: Vertical Autoclaves
description: Space-efficient vertical sterilizers for laboratories, clinics, and smaller CSSD units where dependable sterilization is needed within a compact footprint.

name: Bedpan / Bowl & Utensil Sterilizers
description: Dedicated systems for patient-care utensils in ward and ICU environments, supporting infection-control workflows outside the main CSSD.

name: Hot & Cold-Water Pressure Sterilizers
description: Pressure sterilization systems using hot and cold-water cycles for specialized medical, laboratory, and pharma-adjacent requirements.

name: Bio Medical Waste Sanitizers
description: On-site biomedical waste sanitization systems for healthcare facilities that need controlled treatment workflows before disposal.

name: Tabletop Sterilization Units
description: Compact bench-top autoclaves for dental clinics, outpatient procedure rooms, and smaller facilities with limited floor space.

name: CSSD Furniture & Equipment Trolleys
description: Stainless-steel workstations, instrument trolleys, and sterile storage infrastructure configured for CSSD workflow and infection-control zoning.
